/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wextra -pedantic -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/algorithm/frequency_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/algorithm/signature_generator_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/algorithm/signature_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/audio/byte_control_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/audio/downsampler_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/audio/wav_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/public_api_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/utils/base64_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/utils/crc32_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/utils/fft_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_unit_tests.dir/utils/ring_buffer_test.cpp.o -o vibra_unit_tests  ../lib/libvibra.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a -lm ../lib/libgtest.a -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
